title: eschweilera costaricensis
intro: Eschweilera costaricensis, also known as the Guayabillo tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lecythidaceae. It is a tree that is native to Central America and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Eschweilera costaricensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or infusion, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and wounds.
